pages.text: The absolute pinnacle of their engineering. The $(item)Pyramid Core$() does not generate power itself, but rather $(alien)resonates$() with reality, broadcasting a massive efficiency boost to nearby $(l:patchouli:machines/quantum_vacuum_turbine)Quantum Vacuum Turbines$(/l).

pages.title: Activation
pages.text: The Core remains dormant until built into a massive pyramidal structure. Once built, it must be ignited by consuming an $(l:patchouli:materials/alloys_disks)Inertial Stability Alloy$(/l) or touched by an $(l:patchouli:tools/ancient_ankh)Ancient Ankh$(/l).

pages.name: Pyramid Tier 1
pages.text: The Tier 1 Structure requires a 3x3 of $(gold)Gold Blocks$() directly beneath the Core, followed by a 5x5 of $(alien)Alien Pyramid Casing$(). Grants a modest boost.
